scope: VCHarness paper-level module universe across perturbation-response and adjacent virtual-cell tasks

coverage_policy.minimum_rule: This manifest must include every module family explicitly visible in the VCHarness paper/system overview/public task atlas that is relevant to model search. Local search spaces may gate modules by task/artifact status, but must not omit them from the universe.
coverage_policy.strict_execution_rule: A module can be listed without being implemented. If MCTS selects it, Codex must acquire source-backed artifacts or implement a faithful artifact-backed node; otherwise mark blocked. Fallback, compact native, proxy, and random substitutes are forbidden in strict mode.

source_evidence.note: GenBio overview describing closed-loop VCHarness, biological foundation model library, MCTS, and four CRISPR cell-line benchmarks.
Public static case-study scaffold for HepG2, Jurkat, K562, and hTERT-RPE1 classification tracks.
Public scFoundation model page; encoder-only limitation must be recorded when used.

paper_reported_scale.note: The public GitHub scaffold is a case-study tree. The internal orchestrator and some exact original checkpoints are not fully public.

status_taxonomy.paper_original_acquired_public_source: Module or source-backed public artifact is acquired locally and can be used after audit.
status_taxonomy.paper_original_acquired_public_source_bu: Checkpoint exists, but the selected node must still verify row order, vocabulary, and extraction for the cell-line task.
status_taxonomy.paper_original_blocked_unavailable_prima: The original artifact expected by paper/public code is not verifiably downloadable from primary sources.
status_taxonomy.paper_original_acquirable_or_needs_verif: Belongs to the paper universe; Codex must acquire and verify before training.
status_taxonomy.paper_original_source_backed_reimplement: No exact artifact has been verified; a documented public-data reimplementation is allowed but must be labeled.
status_taxonomy.paper_original_task_gated_or_extension: In the broader universe, but only selectable for task contracts with the needed modality.
status_taxonomy.paper_level_derived_public_source: Source-backed derived artifact, not necessarily the original checkpoint.
status_taxonomy.paper_original_public_scaffold_acquired: Public scaffold/code is available, but exact execution may still require non-public model dirs.

modules.source: GenBio AIDO model family / VCHarness system overview
modules.download_policy: Acquire only from official GenBio/model-hub source when task includes DNA sequence inputs.
modules.rebuild_estimate: Foundation-model scale; do not train from scratch for this project.
modules.strict_use_rule: Task-gated; do not select for K562 DEG unless sequence/regulatory inputs are explicitly added.

modules.source: GenBio AIDO model family / VCHarness system overview
modules.download_policy: Acquire official source if a sequence task requires it.
modules.rebuild_estimate: Foundation-model scale; outside ordinary K562 DEG rerun.
modules.strict_use_rule: Task-gated; cannot be silently substituted with nucleotide k-mers.

modules.download_policy: Search official GenBio/model-hub source; verify hidden size/vocab/config before marking present.
modules.strict_use_rule: May be selected for K562 only after real checkpoint or cached embeddings are verified.

modules.source: VCHarness Jurkat motif and task atlas
modules.download_policy: Search official GenBio/model-hub source; verify checkpoint before use.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must load real AIDO.Cell-10M or block.

modules.download_policy: Replay experiments/search_space_artifact_acquisition_sweep/DOWNLOAD_REPLAY.sh.
modules.strict_use_rule: Usable as paper-original when checksum/provenance audit passes.

modules.download_policy: Search official GenBio source; verify model card/config/weights.
modules.rebuild_estimate: Foundation-model scale if training from scratch.
modules.strict_use_rule: Protein branch only; no random protein embedding substitute.

modules.download_policy: Acquire only when compute/storage budget allows; verify official checkpoint.
modules.rebuild_estimate: Not practical to rebuild for this project.
modules.strict_use_rule: Large protein branch; require explicit artifact and GPU budget.

modules.download_policy: Research public source; if unavailable mark blocked.
modules.rebuild_estimate: Not practical from scratch; requires protein LM/RAG infrastructure.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must be source-backed; graph/protein cache is not equivalent.

modules.source: Meta ESM2 public model family / VCHarness size sweep
modules.download_policy: Download from facebook/esm2_t12_35M_UR50D or official mirror when selected.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must map perturbed/target genes to protein sequences and record coverage.

modules.source: Meta ESM2 public model family / VCHarness size sweep
modules.download_policy: Download from facebook/esm2_t30_150M_UR50D or official mirror when selected.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must record sequence source and coverage.

modules.download_policy: Replay DOWNLOAD_REPLAY.sh.
modules.strict_use_rule: Use real checkpoint/derived embeddings only.

modules.source: Meta ESM2 public model family / VCHarness HepG2 branch
modules.download_policy: Download from facebook/esm2_t36_3B_UR50D only with storage/GPU approval.
modules.rebuild_estimate: Not needed but large inference cost.
modules.strict_use_rule: Large model; must be explicit in cost report.

modules.source: genbio-ai/STRING_GNN public HF repo checked; only .gitattributes visible at sweep time.
modules.download_policy: Do not mark present until config/weights/graph_data.pt/node_names.json are source-backed.
modules.rebuild_estimate: 1-4 weeks for compatibility reimplementation/training depending graph objective; not numerically equivalent to original.
modules.strict_use_rule: Required for original static wrappers; STRING graph or cached embeddings are not substitutes.

modules.source: STRING v12 API / official STRING public data.
modules.download_policy: Rebuild from STRING public data for each cell-line gene vocabulary.
modules.rebuild_estimate: Minutes-hours to rebuild graph; no model training.
modules.strict_use_rule: Usable for graph priors but not equivalent to STRING_GNN checkpoint.

modules.download_policy: Derive spectral features from source-backed STRING graph; record method/checksum.
modules.strict_use_rule: Derived graph feature, not official model unless exact artifact is published.

modules.download_policy: Derive sequence/neighbor features from STRING graph with documented recipe.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must be auditable source-backed derived artifact.

modules.download_policy: Reimplement graph wavelet convolution features from STRING source if selected.
modules.strict_use_rule: Do not collapse to simple Laplacian and call it WaveGC.

modules.download_policy: Reimplement network embedding/graph net from STRING public graph if selected.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must document architecture; simple graph degree is not enough.

modules.download_policy: Replay repo artifact/data preparation flow.
modules.rebuild_estimate: Not needed if h5ad is present; original training recipe not required for cached baseline.
modules.strict_use_rule: Usable as cached embedding/root, not as STRING_GNN model dir.

modules.source: genbio-ai/scFoundation public model; encoder-only limitation documented on HF.
modules.download_policy: Replay DOWNLOAD_REPLAY.sh, then implement task-row embedding extraction if selected.
modules.rebuild_estimate: Checkpoint acquired; K562 row-aligned embeddings may take hours-days.
modules.strict_use_rule: Checkpoint present is not enough; selected node must verify row/vocab/order contract.

modules.download_policy: Replay DOWNLOAD_REPLAY.sh, then verify gene vocabulary/expression encoder contract.
modules.rebuild_estimate: Checkpoint acquired; task adapter/embedding extraction hours-days.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must not use random expression encoder as scGPT.

modules.download_policy: Replay DOWNLOAD_REPLAY.sh; verify tokenizer/gene vocabulary against task.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must verify gene token vocabulary and cell input contract.

modules.download_policy: Search official public checkpoint/source when selected.
modules.rebuild_estimate: Not practical to pretrain; downstream adapter if acquired.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must be official/source-backed before selection can train.

modules.download_policy: Replay DOWNLOAD_REPLAY.sh; verify task encoder contract on selection.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must verify gene vocabulary and row alignment.

modules.download_policy: Replay DOWNLOAD_REPLAY.sh.
modules.rebuild_estimate: Not needed if embedding table maps target genes.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must record mapping coverage and missing genes.

modules.source: VCHarness task-atlas motif list / Gene Ontology biological process descriptions.
modules.download_policy: Derive from public GO BP descriptions and embedding model with documented version.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must distinguish derived BP subset from paper original artifact.

modules.source: VCHarness task-atlas motif list / GO cellular component descriptions.
modules.download_policy: Derive from public GO CC descriptions and embedding model with documented version.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must document exact text corpus.

modules.source: VCHarness task-atlas motif list / GO molecular function descriptions.
modules.download_policy: Derive from public GO MF descriptions and embedding model with documented version.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must document exact text corpus.

modules.source: VCHarness task-atlas motif list / NCBI gene summaries.
modules.download_policy: Derive from public NCBI gene summaries and embedding model with documented version.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must document source snapshot.

modules.source: VCHarness task-atlas motif list / combined NCBI and UniProt text.
modules.download_policy: Derive from public NCBI/UniProt text with documented embedding model.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must not mix undocumented text snapshots.

modules.source: DepMap public releases / VCHarness task-atlas motif list.
modules.download_policy: Download public DepMap release and align genes/cell lines when selected.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must record release, gene IDs, and whether K562-specific signal is used.

modules.download_policy: Search public checkpoint/source; otherwise source-backed reimplementation requires genotype data.
modules.rebuild_estimate: Weeks if training from genotype cohorts.
modules.strict_use_rule: Task-gated; not selected for K562 unless genotype inputs exist.

modules.download_policy: Derive documented positional embeddings only if task has genomic coordinate contract.
modules.strict_use_rule: Task-gated; coordinates and genome build must be recorded.

modules.download_policy: Derive with documented genome build/coordinate source.
modules.strict_use_rule: Task-gated; cannot use arbitrary target index as positional prior.

modules.download_policy: Derive with documented genome build/coordinate source.
modules.strict_use_rule: Task-gated; genome build required.

modules.source: Sequence/regulatory model universe; not default K562 DEG module.
modules.download_policy: Only select for sequence/regulatory task with explicit inputs.
modules.strict_use_rule: Not K562 DEG default; include so universe is not smaller for sequence tasks.

modules.source: Reactome public pathway database or equivalent source-backed pathway release.
modules.download_policy: Build per cell-line target vocabulary through artifact acquisition resolver.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must verify target order, pathway source, and coverage.

modules.source: Public regulatory network source to be selected by acquisition resolver.
modules.download_policy: Search/download source-backed network; block if source cannot be verified.
modules.rebuild_estimate: Hours-days for public network alignment; weeks for de novo inference.
modules.strict_use_rule: No fabricated regulatory edges.

modules.download_policy: None.
modules.strict_use_rule: Must be labeled baseline, not foundation model.

modules.download_policy: Git clone public repo; parse each cell-line static tree as benchmark scaffold.
modules.rebuild_estimate: Not needed; static case-study code is public, but hidden model dirs may still block exact execution.
modules.strict_use_rule: Scaffold/reference unless exact required artifacts are present.
